title: Nora Ephron Remembers Nothing Except Feeling Bad About Her Neck
summary: It’s Nora Ephron anthology week! We took a look at two of her essay collections, I Feel Bad About My Neck and I Remember Nothing to remember what proper storytelling looks like.  THE FINAL STOP ON OUR TOUR  June 14: New York  If you want to host a CMBC meetup here’s a meetup 101 packet to help you plan! title: Hilaria Baldwin Doesn't Have a Manual
summary: Who’s that girl doin yoga next to Alec Baldwin?? It’s Hilaria and she’s ready to tell her side of the story. And only her side. You won’t get most of the story. But you will find out who she feels wronged her in their coverage.  With special guests Eliza and Julia from Binchtopia!!!!  WE’RE BACK ON TOUR May 16: London  May 18: Dublin June 14: New York  If you want to host a CMBC meetup here’s a meetup 101 packet to help you plan!
